ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the indicator (e.g., SMA, WMA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description providing details about the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the indicator was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the indicator (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial indicator on that date */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "time_collected" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES financial_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name given to the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio which this holding belongs to */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the instrument */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the holding (e.g., active, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial indicator used for prediction */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the indicator */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for the predicted value */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES financial_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial indicator */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Calculated trend value */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend value */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trend (e.g., active, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES financial_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial indicator for the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, resolved) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date the alert was triggered */,
  "email_notification" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if email notifications are enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (could be a JSON string) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, analysis) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, reviewed) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the feedback (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
